top.title: Israel strikes southern Lebanon but partial truce with Hezbollah appears to hold
top.summary: Israel continues its campaign in the south, though has not struck Beirut after a deal announced by the US.

top.title: 'They'll fix the building, but not our souls': Sleepy Kyiv neighbourhood hit in Russian strike
top.summary: Scenes of devastation greet residents emerging from underground shelters after a major Russian attack.

top.title: British couple lose Iran jail sentence appeal, family says
top.summary: Lindsay and Craig Foreman were arrested in January 2025 during a global motorbike journey.

top.title: Microsoft says new quantum chip 1,000 times more reliable than predecessor
top.summary: The tech giant predicts it will have a quantum computer that can solve commercially useful problems by the end of the decade.

top.title: Instagram AI chatbot tricked by hackers to give access to others' accounts
top.summary: Some reports have linked the incident to recent cases of high-profile Instagram accounts being hijacked.

top.title: How 'confused' AI rollout hurts firms and baffles staff
top.summary: Some firms are putting pressure on staff to use AI, but have not thought through their AI rollout.
